svg.title: Toxic planet illustration
svg.desc: A stylized cartoon toxic planet with lime green colors, glowing atmosphere, bubbling craters, and animations including bobbing, rotation, and pulsing bubbles.

g.style: animation: rotateStripe 22s linear infinite reverse;;fill:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke:none;color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto

animation: rotateStripe 18s linear infinite 1s;;fill:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke:none;color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto
